name: James Hardie Industries Plc
analysis: JHX's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 19% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$36.1100. Trade idea: entry A$37.4700, stop A$30.8781, target A$57.2457 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
